summary.current_judgment: Viewer, intake, retrieval, and settings regressions are normalized. The packet now closes with the full suite green under the active runtime contracts.

failure_modes_closed: Viewer code action buttons exposed stale accessibility labels and triggered frontend build failure risk.
Customer pack draft upload rejected valid base64 payload fallback paths.
Internal customer pack summary text drifted away from the active intake contract wording.
Retrieval latest-only filtering dropped valid review and active-manifest combinations.
Reranker companion rescue logic lost etcd backup and registry/storage companion evidence.
Pytest process imports leaked repo .env into settings and runtime report tests.
Quick Navigation links lost static href anchors and broke viewer regression expectations.
known_open_risks: The worktree still contains unrelated pre-existing edits outside this packet and they were intentionally left untouched.
The suite still emits upstream deprecation warnings from cgi and ragas imports.
owner_decisions: Blocked implicit python-dotenv loading at package import time instead of weakening settings defaults.
Restored viewer quick navigation as standard anchor links while keeping existing data attributes available.
Kept retrieval rescue behavior minimal and contract-driven instead of broad reranker reshuffling.
notes: Targeted viewer, intake, retrieval, runtime report, and settings regressions were revalidated before the full suite run.
